modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Students unable to upload or record video assignments in D2L.

full_description_text: I’m trying to have my students upload video assignments in D2L, but it’s not working. They also need to record and upload their videos, and I can’t find a way to do this. It’s really frustrating because I need this feature for my class.
short_description: Students unable to upload or record video assignments in D2L.
description: I’m trying to have my students upload video assignments in D2L, but it’s not working. They also need to record and upload their videos, and I can’t find a way to do this. It’s really frustrating because I need this feature for my class.
